areas.top_stats: col-span-1 md:col-span-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4

surfaces.terminal: bg-[#050505] border border-slate-800 rounded-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative
surfaces.modals: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0D0E12]/95 border border-slate-800 shadow-2xl rounded-sm

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 hover:bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.terminal_action: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#0D0E12] border border-slate-700 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm text-sm font-mono text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-600 transition-colors

icons_and_assets.usage: Use technical/system icons: Activity, Terminal, Shield, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, Cpu, HardDrive, Key, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, Play, Square, Pause, Loader2.

interactions.hover: Keep hover states sharp and instantaneous. Fast transitions (150ms).
interactions.terminal: Logs should visually append at the bottom. The terminal container should scroll cleanly.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast compliance, especially for terminal logs (bright green/white/red on solid black).
accessibility.motion: Use reduced-motion for progress bars if needed, keep terminal text updates performant.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Write standard React Javascript (.js, .jsx) files. DO NOT USE Typescript.
Implement a Dark Mode exclusively. The app is a forensic/security dashboard, do not add a light mode toggle.

Layout: Build a 'Control Room' dense grid. Top section for system vitals (CPU, Disk, btcrecover ready state). Left side for configuration (Seed length, known words, masks). Right side for live execution and logs.

Terminal Panel: Design a realistic terminal output window for live logs. Use JetBrains Mono or standard monospace font. Background #050505, text #22C55E (success/info), #F87171 (errors), #E2E8F0 (standard stdout).
Live Progress Widget: Must include real-time ETA, candidates/sec (in font-mono), current candidate string being tested, and a highly visible horizontal progress bar.
Seed Config Panel: For known words, render a grid of 12 or 24 input boxes. Use monospace fonts for the inputs to give a technical feel.

Found-Seed Reveal Modal: When the job finishes with 'found', dim the entire UI heavily (`bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md`). Show the recovered seed prominently in a bordered, glowing, highly visible box. Include 'Copy to Clipboard' and 'Clear & Close' security actions.
ALL interactive elements and key informational displays MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-job-btn', data-testid='seed-word-input-3').
Component styling: When using Shadcn UI components, override their border-radius to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none` to fit the technical/CLI wrapper vibe. Do not use soft, rounded interfaces.
